title: Gendo Ultimately Good or Evil
wikitext:
[]: Gendo: Ultimately Good or Evil?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Sep 09, 2009 9:59 pm Topic. The difference between this and the villain topic is that this one focuses on Gendo himself. Overall, would you consider him to be good or evil? (Pick one or the other, please .)

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Wed Sep 09, 2009 10:01 pm but picking one or the other would ignore the depth that his character has. He isn't good or evil, despite being a drawing his character isn't two dimensional. He wants to see Yui and doesn't care about sacrificing people, yeah it's selfish and probably what people would call 'bad' but i wouldn't go so far as to say evil

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Wed Sep 09, 2009 10:01 pm A madman who will stop at nothing and get rid of whoever stands in his way to see his wife again. Sounds evil to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Wed Sep 09, 2009 10:02 pm If I had to choose, I'd say evil. he's doing cruel things for selfish reasons, I'm not sure if Gendo is Lawful-Evil or Nuetral-Evil though...I'm leaning towards the latter...but still...

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Wed Sep 09, 2009 10:03 pm fine i'll go along, he is teh evilz! he has a beard, glasses and gloves and doesn't afraid of anything!

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Sep 09, 2009 10:20 pm I'd say he's good. I'm not trolling, but I honestly can't type anything to back up my opinion.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Sep 09, 2009 10:24 pm He's human plain and simple, no clear cut good or evil need apply. I am not a gendo fan and I do not forgive his actions, but no he's not evil.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Sep 09, 2009 10:42 pm DatDude wrote: He human plain and simple, no clear cut good or evil need apply. I am not a gendo fan and I do not forgive his actions, but no he's not evil.

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Wed Sep 09, 2009 11:04 pm I'd go with true neutral. He's ruthless to the nth degree, and he'd do anything to achieve his own goals. Still, he doesn't go out of his way to be a dick, and he's been shown to legitamately care for a few characters. And by a few characters I mean Yui, Rei, and Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Wed Sep 09, 2009 11:21 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: DatDude wrote: He human plain and simple, no clear cut good or evil need apply. I am not a gendo fan and I do not forgive his actions, but no he's not evil.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Sep 10, 2009 2:05 am Gendo is too busy being awesome to worry about such petty notions.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Sep 10, 2009 5:47 am Pimps can't be good or evil. He just means serious business. Thats how the game works. He gotta keep his pimp hand strong.

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Thu Sep 10, 2009 10:07 am well, IMO he's definitely not a good man. i think he is a jerk-faced manipulative bastard with incredibly questionable morals who doesn't give a crap about anything or anyone else so long as he gets what he wants. however, his reason for not giving a crap isn't... well, it isn't what i would define as "evil." he isn't just bent on world destruction simply because he can, or because he hates the world or anything like that. so, in that sense, he's probably not actually evil, either. severely, severely flawed, more like. that doesn't mean i'm going to stop calling him "evil bastard," though. it may be the incorrect term but it's so satisfying to use it human? biologically, i guess. but emotionally speaking "humanity" implies a certain level of positive behavior, at least for me. in my eyes, gendo's flaws outweigh his positive side by far too much for me to be comfortable calling him human. i could never think of him as "good," though. that's for sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Thu Sep 10, 2009 10:45 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: I always found Gendo to be a classically crafted romantically tragic character.

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Thu Sep 10, 2009 3:01 pm Hi there, Not trying to start a fight or anything. However... DatDude wrote: He's human plain and simple, no clear cut good or evil need apply.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Sep 10, 2009 3:32 pm CyberXIII wrote: Overall, would you consider him to be good or evil? (Pick one or the other, please.)

[]:             Quote Post by Taumiel » Thu Sep 10, 2009 3:44 pm Is it possible that Gendo tried to keep his son away from the whole business, and only looked for him when he had absolutely no other way to deal with the angels? I think that maybe NERV was in a very, very tight schedule in order to have an operative EVA unit before the first angel attack. SEELE distrusted Gendo, so they didn't have unit 02 transfered until it proved necessary. I'm starting to believe that the original plan was having Rei in unit 00 fighting Sachiel. When she got injured during the activation test, Gendo was forced to switch to plan B. Think about it. What did gendo gain with having an absolute rookie fighting Sachiel? Even if he knew trat unit 01 would go berserker, he was risking everything! If Shinji was to pilot from the start, why not have him training some years in advance, like Asuka did? And SEELE didn't like unit 01 going berserker at all, that's why they scolded Gendo as they did in the second episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Sep 10, 2009 4:00 pm Taumiel wrote: Is it possible that Gendo tried to keep his son away from the whole business, and only looked for him when he had absolutely no other way to deal with the angels?

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Sep 10, 2009 5:56 pm The motive does not excuse his actions towards Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Sep 10, 2009 7:31 pm Shinji's general fagginess excuses Gendo's actions toward him.
